title: BEM-698 check hourly
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-19 | 11:08 (UTC+3)'

def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
state_path=Path('governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json')
snapshot_path=Path('governance/state/curator_hourly_report_last_snapshot.json')
report_path=Path('governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md')
workflow_path=Path('.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml')
try:
    state=json.loads(read(state_path)) if state_path.exists() else {}
except Exception as e:
    state={'parse_error':str(e)}
try:
    snap=json.loads(read(snapshot_path)) if snapshot_path.exists() else {}
except Exception as e:
    snap={'parse_error':str(e)}
wf=read(workflow_path)
rep=read(report_path)
checks=[
 {'name':'workflow_exists','pass':workflow_path.exists(),'evidence':str(workflow_path)},
 {'name':'schedule_present','pass':'schedule:' in wf and 'cron:' in wf,'evidence':str(workflow_path)},
 {'name':'state_exists','pass':state_path.exists(),'evidence':str(state_path)},
 {'name':'snapshot_exists','pass':snapshot_path.exists(),'evidence':str(snapshot_path)},
 {'name':'last_state_has_generated_at','pass':bool(state.get('generated_at')),'evidence':str(state_path)},
 {'name':'last_delivery_recorded','pass':bool(state.get('telegram_delivery')),'evidence':str(state_path)},
]
last_generated=state.get('generated_at')
last_period=state.get('period')
last_delivery=state.get('telegram_delivery')
last_status=state.get('status')
message_preview=''
if rep:
    lines=rep.splitlines()
    message_preview='\n'.join(lines[:20])
# If workflow has not committed state after 11:00, it likely has not run yet or failed before commit. We cannot see Action history via repo files.
status='state_checked'
blocker=None
if not workflow_path.exists():
    status='blocked_no_workflow'; blocker={'code':'CURATOR_HOURLY_WORKFLOW_MISSING'}
elif not state_path.exists() or not snapshot_path.exists():
    status='blocked_missing_state_or_snapshot'; blocker={'code':'CURATOR_HOURLY_STATE_MISSING'}
state_out={'schema_version':'check_hourly_after_11_no_message.v1','bem':'BEM-698','status':status,'last_generated':last_generated,'last_period':last_period,'last_delivery':last_delivery,'last_report_status':last_status,'checks':checks,'message_preview':message_preview,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
out=Path('governance/state/bem698_check_hourly_after_11_no_message.json')
out.write_text(json.dumps(state_out,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem698_check_hourly_after_11_no_message.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-698 | Check Hourly After 11 No Message | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Last generated: '+str(last_generated)+sep+'Last period: '+str(last_period)+sep+'Last delivery: '+str(last_delivery)+sep+'Last status: '+str(last_status)+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem698_check_hourly_after_11_no_message','status':status,'last_generated':last_generated,'last_period':last_period,'last_delivery':last_delivery,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem698_check_hourly_after_11_no_message.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-698 '+status+' last_generated='+str(last_generated)+' last_period='+str(last_period)+' delivery='+str(last_delivery)+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(out),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Checked persisted curator hourly state/snapshot after operator reported no visible 11:00 message')
"""
No issue comments.
